## TaskQueryOptions.deferredToFuture property

When `true`<!-- -->, matches tasks whose `deferDate` is non-null and in the future (`t.deferDate > new Date()`<!-- -->). Used by `queryDeferred` `blockedOnly: true`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
deferredToFuture?: boolean | undefined;
```
